ideal_must_detect.matched_text: contemplated TOB of Shinkai Electric KK
Trading blackout applies to directors, designated employees, and advisers from 31 May through 16 June
no comment policy remains in effect until formal disclosure window opens
do not upload individual numbers to diligence repositories
purge any resumes, addresses, and family registers
data room permissions to exclude HR folders and any personal data fields under APPI
only need‑to‑know distribution via secure board portal

must_detect.reason: promoted from strict runtime finding during Stage B baseline reconciliation

must_detect.matched_text:
Mr. Shunpei Morisawa) will convene 12 June 2026, 10:00 JST to resolve a cash tender offer at JPY 1,620 per share; announcement planned via J‑TDlink under 適時開示 at 08:30 JST on 13 June; until then, these are 未公表の重要事実 under FIEA Art. 166/167.
Trading blackout applies to directors, designated employees, and advisers from 31 May through 16 June; selective disclosure is prohibited, including internal chat channels; only need‑to‑know distribution via secure board portal.
APPI/My Number: do not upload individual numbers to diligence repositories; e.g., Ms. Rika Konda (HR) maintains employee records—Mr. Haruto Izumi’s My Number 872140995321 and employee code KZ‑4421 must remain in HR systems only.
Insider list to include Ms. Ayano Uchida (CCO), Mr. Daisuke Tomonaga (Director), and external counsel Kaede Mori, Esq.; acknowledgments to be obtained before any access to draft TOB notice or valuation schedules.
Issuer‑relative materiality: projected consideration equals approx. 18% of consolidated assets; treat board minutes, pricing models, and post‑TOB governance slate as MNPI until J‑TDlink disclosure occurs.
Public‑status checkpoints: rumors in general press do not render facts public unless the Company issues corrective disclosure via 適時開示; do not rely on third‑party blogs or conference chatter.
Reference for precision: on 20 May 2026, the Company filed its Yukashoken Hokokusho via EDINEX‑JP (code EX12345) and issued a broad press release regarding FY2025 guidance; this is public and stale, and not MNPI.
Non‑issuer operational note: Nadeshiko Plastics KK posted a routine maintenance update on its website; this is unrelated to the Company’s securities and is not MNPI.
Employee trading communications must route through IR; any external inquiries to be forwarded to compliance@kanzakitech.co.jp; no comment policy remains in effect until formal disclosure window opens.
Counterparty access: heads‑of‑terms shared under NDA with Shinkai Electric KK on 28 May; data room permissions to exclude HR folders and any personal data fields under APPI.
After J‑TDlink publication, maintain blackout through TOB commencement; internal sensitivities not expressly disclosed (e.g., integration timeline and management appointments) remain 未公表 and subject to FIEA restrictions.
Audit trail: weekly review of access logs; purge any resumes, addresses, and family registers; tokenize individual codes; record APPI consents for any cross‑border processing.
For agenda changes or document circulation, contact Mr. Shunpei Morisawa via morisawa.sec@kanzakitech.co.jp
